card_types.name: Junk Card
card_types.border_prompt: Thick wide cartoon border frame, brown rusty pipes and duct tape holding together junk and scrap metal, bolts popping out, a cartoon wrench and plunger sticking out of corners, fun whimsical junkyard style, colorful cartoon illustration style, very wide border, black center, game card frame, highly detailed

card_types.name: Personnel

card_types.name: Action
